artifacts.title: University of Karachi AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official University of Karachi searches and compliant fetch attempts did not identify a reliable public central AI-use or generative-AI policy source. The accessible official UOK-hosted source verified in this run was the Imtezaaj Urdu Research Journal plagiarism policy, so staged claims are limited to source-status and adjacent plagiarism-check context.
limitations: No reliable public official University of Karachi central AI-use or generative-AI policy source was found during this run.
Official curriculum, prospectus, and event-like AI references were rejected or skipped as low-specificity policy sources.
The Imtezaaj policy is journal-manuscript context and must not be treated as a university-wide student AI policy.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
